 minus
 select BATCH_NUMBER, SUMMARY_LINE_ID,COST_ID,TRANSACTION_SOURCE,PROJECT_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from DL_ACCUM.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLOAD_DTLS
 ) ACM 
 where 
 COALESCE(ACM.BATCH_NUMBER,'UNK') = COALESCE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLOAD_DTLS.BATCH_NUMBER,'UNK') and
 COALESCE(ACM.SUMMARY_LINE_ID,-999) = COALESCE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLOAD_DTLS.SUMMARY_LINE_ID,-999) and
 COALESCE(ACM.COST_ID,-999) = COALESCE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLOAD_DTLS.COST_ID,-999) and
 COALESCE(ACM.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,'UNK') = COALESCE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLOAD_DTLS.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,'UNK') and
 COALESCE(ACM.PROJECT_NUMBER,'UNK') = COALESCE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLOAD_DTLS.PROJECT_NUMBER,'UNK') and
 ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CST_UPLOAD_DTLS.REFRESH_DATETIME
